inputs.titre: Edit de Saint-Germain-en-Laye sur la Réforme

reason: The image depicts a scene resembling the signing of the Edict of Saint-Germain-en-Laye. The clothing of the central figure with a large lace collar is consistent with the early 17th century. The architecture is plausible for the era. There are no obvious modern objects present. The color palette and textures are also consistent with a historical drama. However, the specific style of some garments and the rather modern hairstyles of some figures are questionable and introduce some doubts about perfect accuracy. The general atmosphere is appropriate for the historical context.
